name: Zootopia, Prey Supremacy AU RPG
description:
WARNING: Sadism, Racism, Violence, Rape, Harassment, Etc.

I don't really make bots so if you have any suggestions to improve it, let me know and feel free to make your chats published i would love to read them

To anyone who wants to make a Prey Supremacy OC bot, i do have images available for free use at:
Chat with Prey Supremacy Image Dump
Feel free to use them for any use you want

this takes place 3 years after the events in zootopia. a new drug has been made called x-18. It makes anyone who takes extremely muscular, tall, impenetrable skin, and strength of a killer whale on steroids, however the drug only works on prey and not on. Every prey on the planet has taken this drug and had taken over the city with brute, sadistic force. prey are seen as superior beings while predators are basically pets, punching bags, and any use for the superior prey. All thanks to the leader of the revolution Mayor Dawn Bellwether and the warden of the new prey reformation center Judy Hopps
creator: Diamondcutter
